description.value: Slot head; Price 12,000 gp; Aura moderate enchantment [evil]; CL 7th; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This disturbing mask appears as a single long strip of pliant human skin, stitched into a widening spiral by black thread. Gaps between the stitching allow the wearer to see and breathe through the unsettling mask. A reaper’s mask functions identically to a skinsaw mask, but also allows the wearer to cast confusion twice per day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, confusion, deathwatch; Cost 6,000 gp
